steps.assistant_text: Bundle-iterator + vtable dispatch, 58.95%->exact (~31 variants). (1) Address-taken cur/next via dead while(0){pp=&cur;pp=&next;} -> memory homes sp+0x18/0x1C, advance temps stay in the ugen t-ring; (2) ternary-comma advance node=(cur!=NULL)?(next=cur[1],cur[0]):NULL -> collapsed-else b .+1 shape; (3) node reassigned at loop top + NO return statement (fall-off-end int) -> node web colors v0, no trailing move; (4) if(0){vt=NULL;} DEAD MULTI-DEF demotes vt's LR in the constrained (priority) pass -> colors v1 with one CSE'd lw (removing it regresses to 26/38). NEW MECHANISM: the constrained pass sorts by adjsave DENSITY — a dense CSE temp beats every user var and anchors can't outbid it; the dead multi-def is the demotion lever.
